name: anaglysh
description: A red/cyan anaglyph terminal emulator nobody asked for.

scripts.dev: concurrently -k -n server,vite,electron "node src/server/server.cjs" "vite --host 127.0.0.1" "wait-on tcp:3333 tcp:5173 && cross-env ANAGLYSH_URL=http://127.0.0.1:5173 electron ."
scripts.start: npm run build && concurrently -k -n server,electron "cross-env ANAGLYSH_STATIC_DIR=dist node src/server/server.cjs" "wait-on tcp:3333 && electron ."
scripts.dev:nosandbox: concurrently -k -n server,vite,electron "node src/server/server.cjs" "vite --host 127.0.0.1" "wait-on tcp:3333 tcp:5173 && cross-env ANAGLYSH_URL=http://127.0.0.1:5173 electron --no-sandbox ."
scripts.start:nosandbox: npm run build && concurrently -k -n server,electron "cross-env ANAGLYSH_STATIC_DIR=dist node src/server/server.cjs" "wait-on tcp:3333 && electron --no-sandbox ."
